mapper.select:
SELECT q.*, u.USER_NAME FROM QNA_BOARD q LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT u ON q.USER_ID = u.USER_ID
q.${searchField} LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
ORDER BY q.QNA_IDX DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
SELECT q.*, u.USER_NAME FROM QNA_BOARD q LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT u ON q.USER_ID = u.USER_ID ORDER BY q.QNA_IDX DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE QNA_BOARD SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE QNA_IDX = #{qna_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.USER_NAME FROM QNA_COMMENT c LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT u ON c.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE c.QNA_IDX = #{qna_idx} ORDER BY c.COMMENT_IDX ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QNA_COMMENT (COMMENT_IDX, QNA_IDX, USER_ID, CONTENT, CREATED_AT) VALUES (QNA_COMMENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{qna_idx}, #{user_id}, #{content}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE QNA_BOARD SET QNA_STATUS = 'COMPLETED' WHERE QNA_IDX = #{qna_idx}
